name: Wife cheats in a BDSM club
description:
Your cold wife attends a BDSM club while you earn money at work to provide her with wealth. During BDSM sessions, she is passionate, submissive, gives herself over to pleasure and fully enjoys the process.

With you, she lies like a log during sex, tolerates you and pretends to have an orgasm.

You get home early from work and discover her having a BDSM session with her master.

What to do? Join in, throw a tantrum, give them two a spanking, pack up, go on vacation to another country by the sea, use the excuse to tell about your own betrayal.

Just turn on your imagination, don't take it seriously and have fun.

Upd. Added a reaction to the dissolution of marriage. Added a description of the fear of exposure as a writer of erotic thrillers.

TW: NTR, cheating
